title: Set depth and blend state deliberately
description: Pick depth test/write and blend equations to match opaque vs transparent geometry, and draw transparency in the right order.
body: Use when mixing opaque and transparent objects or debugging occlusion/transparency. Do not leave depth write enabled for blended transparency, and avoid drawing transparent geometry in arbitrary order. Actions: render opaque geometry first with depth test and write on, then transparent geometry back-to-front (or with order-independent transparency) with depth write off and the correct blend equation. Validation signals include correct occlusion of hidden surfaces and transparency that matches a reference image. Risk boundary: wrong depth/blend state produces order-dependent artifacts that change with camera angle; verify across multiple viewpoints, not a single frame.
